feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Base
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,672Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: [The video starts with Bruce, a blue light bathing his face in light—indicating the use of a device in his lap. He's in his bed, leaning against his bedpost and the caption is “I am Base. They can't fight each other if one of them is touching me.” The video then slowly pans lower to Bruce's side, right where Tim has unsubtly wedged himself—looking up at the device in Bruce's lap as if he plans to offer council.][When Tim eventually notices the camera, he just stares at it, without shame of his cowardice. Then the camera leans higher to the side of the bed, showing Richard Grayson relentlessly glaring down at Tim. Jaw clenched so hard you could almost see a nerve flexing. Tim, still in range of the camera, steals a glance at Dick before quickly averting it back to the device in Bruce's lap.][When Bruce returns the camera back to himself, just at the edge of the camera's range—Tim scoots closer. «I can wait. I'm not busy today.» Dick's voice declares before the video cuts.]>Big_Word    @thatsabigwordforelmo “I can wait—” [meme of a soldier amidst war staring wide eyed and unseeing]       51k likes  45 repliesOr Batfamily social media shenanigans

entry.title: Brightest Star in the Night
entry.summary:
Author: FPeanutButter98

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,421Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 82

Summary: When Batman saves an Alien from Luthor, he doesn't expect to fall in love with him. For Kal, Bruce is everything he could have dreamed of. In a world where everything is a secret, having someone by your side is the best superpower of all._Note, you do not need to have read Absolute Superman to understand this fic!

entry.summary:
Author: SmokingThemOutBasements

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,229Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 28

entry.title: Nolan’s Dark Knight v the Man of Steel
entry.summary:
Author: legobiwan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,303Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Three years after the battle with Bane a tragedy accuses on the invasion of Zod which draws Bruce Wayne to return to Gotham along with Alfred and Robin (John Blake). Batman starts planning to capture Superman for his part in the Metropolis destruction, no matter how dark his methods are getting, but Lex Luthor partners with the Joker in their plan to turn The Dark Knight against The Man Of Steel.

entry.title: Let Us Have This
entry.summary:
Author: webheadmenace

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,764Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: The murder of Clark Kent hit his wife, Lois Lane, and his former partner, Bruce Wayne, hard. When they work together to learn the truth about what happened, they uncover something they never could have predicted. Noir AU + Fireplace for the SuperBatLane winter flash bang.

entry.title: Coming Home to You
entry.summary:
Author: RandomFan001

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,370Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Clark had long given up his dream of finding his soulmate. The weird feeling he had when his eyes met Batman’s wasn’t anything but nerves and attraction. Definitely not. But when his instincts start acting up, he starts to suspect it’s something else. Worst of all, so does Batman. Featuring; healthy co-parenting, a healthy amount of pining, and a story about finding love and family

entry.title: bathe me in a gentle blue
entry.summary:
Author: tonguesofliars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,887Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 47

Summary: “Clark,” Bruce says in alarm, wary at the unusual sight of him. He’s unable to recall a moment where he witnessed Clark stumble, yet here he trips over his own feet like a newborn doe. He’s in complete disarray, his clothes frumpy and glasses askew. Hands claw at Clark’s shirt collar like he can’t breathe, his throat a blotchy, deep crimson mess.Clark goes into heat.

entry.title: up, up and ablaze
entry.summary:
Author: grellsutcliffno1fan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,623Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 13

Summary: The first thing he registers is the smell. All loam and smoke, something faintly sweet beneath it.Bruce knows the smell well. He has raised five teenagers now, with a sixth teetering on the brink of thirteen. He was born knee-deep in Gotham’s rot and learned its habits young. Marijuana is not foreign to him.Why, exactly, its scent saturates the apartment of Clark Kent — Pulitzer-winning reporter, farm-raised son of Kansas, and, incidentally, Superman — is another matter entirely. — Or: The SuperBat WeedFic nobody asked for, and that I ignored canon to write

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,326Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 110

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: The Legend of the Last Night Fury
entry.summary:
Author: WatercolorAru

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,471Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: The legend says that one day, the goddess Frigg, weaver of clouds, listened to the prayers from an old couple. They could never have children of their own, but the longing in their hearts never faded. Frigg took a tiny, burning star from the night sky and let it fall on the Earth, right into their arms.With that, the star's fate was sealed. Like a thread, it twisted into knots, stretched, and intertwined, and with whom would it intertwine? The answer was turbulent: nobody else than with his worst enemy. Two people, fated to fight until their last breaths. Or so they thought.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Come As You Are
entry.summary:
Author: everyonethinkstoomuch

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,581Chapters: 29/?Kudos: 173

Summary: 'Bruce was only watching to see how Clark’s sparring was coming along... He wasn’t watching Clark because he liked him or found him attractive. That would be foolish, and not sensible at all, and a distraction from the more important things in life, like beating up criminals every night and passing his exams.'When Clark Kent gets into yet another fight on a night out, his friend Diana suggests he joins the university boxing club to get used to fighting back, without killing someone with his superpowers. Bruce Wayne has just transferred to Metropolis City University and isn’t all too happy about it. Unlike everyone else he knows, he misses Gotham. And now he has to balance university, being Batman, and his feelings for Clark Kent - which he definitely doesn’t have.CONTENT WARNINGS: a little bit of swearing, implied abuse, implied & described mild violence, lots of discussion of dead parents.This is an AU drawing on several different versions of characters and also my own interpretation of them. Bruce is Battinson, Clark is Corensupes & Smallville. The others are a mix of all media types and kind of just what I want them to be!
